response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable depth in DLang, Node.js, and tooling, but lacks explicit, recent experience with JVM ecosystems, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling — key requirements for this role. His Java exposure is minimal and dated, and there’s no evidence of IDE internals or JVM-level tooling work, though his open-source tooling projects and workshop history suggest strong learning agility.
strengths: Demonstrated expertise in building developer tooling and open-source frameworks (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, GISCollective)
Strong track record in cross-stack development and systems design across diverse languages and platforms
Proven ability to teach and communicate complex technical concepts through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise frameworks like Spring or Hibernate
JVM expertise is not evidenced — Java appears only as a minor, outdated skill in early roles
Lacks clear involvement in IDE internals, build tool integration, or application server tooling
